title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Elxsi Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Elxsi Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Tata Elxsi Global Group has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Elxsi Global Group:
Tata Elxsi Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi Global Group!
